title: Evaluate Gateway Performance
description: Contrast the performance characteristics of Node.js-based gateways with those built in Go, Rust, or Envoy. Evaluate gateway performance considering memory footprint and P99 latency under high-concurrency. Analyze the trade-offs in choosing a gateway technology based on performance requirements.
objectives: Contrast the performance characteristics of Node.js-based gateways with those built in Go, Rust, or Envoy.
Evaluate gateway performance considering memory footprint and P99 latency under high-concurrency.
Analyze the trade-offs in choosing a gateway technology based on performance requirements.
